items.summary: Update the HeroBanner component headline to 'Smart Finds for Smarter Living' and subheadline to 'Premium Trending Products at Affordable Prices'. Keep existing CTA buttons ('Shop Now' filled #4DA6FF, 'Explore Deals' outlined), trust micro-badges (Pan India Delivery, Secure Payments, Easy Returns), Poppins font, and #4DA6FF / #111111 color scheme unchanged.
Update the AnnouncementBar to display '🎁 Get ₹100 OFF on Prepaid Orders – Use Code: PAY100'. Keep the existing #4DA6FF background, white bold text, slim py-2 layout, and dismiss button.

Update the FeatureStrip trust icon section to display four pillars: Pan India Delivery (map/location icon), Secure Checkout (lock icon), Cash on Delivery Available (cash/wallet icon), and 7-Day Replacement Guarantee (refresh/shield icon). Each pillar has a large #4DA6FF icon, bold label, and a one-line descriptor. Maintain the existing #F8F8F8 background and horizontal row layout (2x2 on mobile).

Add a 'New Arrivals' product section on the homepage, positioned after the Featured Products section. Display 4 products from the existing mock products data in a 4-column desktop / 2-column mobile grid using the existing ProductCard component. Include a section heading 'New Arrivals' with a subtitle. Add a 'View All' link to /shop.

Add a 'Trending Now' product section on the homepage, positioned after the New Arrivals section. Display 4 products from the existing mock products data (different selection from New Arrivals) using ProductCard in a 4-column desktop / 2-column mobile grid. Include a section heading 'Trending Now' with a subtitle and a 'View All' link to /shop.

Add a bundle offer section on the Product Detail page (below the Add to Cart / Buy Now buttons, above the Combo Offer section). Display two bundle tiers as visually distinct cards or rows: 'Buy 2 & Get 10% OFF' and 'Buy 3 & Get 20% OFF'. Each tier shows the original per-unit price, the discounted total, and a CTA button ('Add 2 to Cart' / 'Add 3 to Cart') that adds the respective quantity of the current product to the cart. Use #4DA6FF accents and rounded-xl cards.

Add a prepaid conversion popup that triggers when a user adds a COD item to the cart or after 10 seconds on the Product Detail page (if not already dismissed this session). The popup headline is 'Complete Payment Online & Get Extra ₹100 OFF 🎁'. Include subtext: 'Prepaid orders get faster dispatch, free shipping, and an instant ₹100 discount. Pay online and save more!' with two CTAs: 'Pay Online & Save' (filled #4DA6FF, links to /shop) and 'Continue with COD' (text link to dismiss). Show only once per session using sessionStorage.

Add checkout nudge messages on the Product Detail page below the bundle offer section and in the CartDrawer below the RTO reduction message. Display three nudge lines: '⚡ Prepaid Orders Get Faster Delivery', '🚫 Avoid COD Verification Delay – Pay Online', '✅ Instant Order Confirmation with Online Payment'. Style as a compact info block with a light blue (#E8F4FF) background, small Poppins text, and #4DA6FF icon accents.

Perform a comprehensive premium brand redesign across all pages and components to eliminate any template or AI-generated appearance. Apply the following improvements without changing the existing color palette (#FFFFFF, #111111, #4DA6FF, Poppins): (1) Increase section vertical padding to py-20 on desktop and py-12 on mobile for all homepage sections. (2) Apply consistent section heading typography: font-bold text-3xl md:text-4xl text-[#111111] with a short colored underline accent in #4DA6FF. (3) Ensure all product cards use rounded-xl, a subtle 1px border (#E5E5E5), white background, and a hover box-shadow of '0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)'. (4) Apply rounded-full to all primary CTA buttons. (5) Improve visual hierarchy by using font-semibold for product names, font-bold for prices, and text-sm text-gray-500 for descriptors. (6) Add generous padding (px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-20) to all page content containers for a non-cramped premium feel. (7) Audit and remove any lingering gradients, heavy drop shadows, or off-brand colors across all components. (8) Ensure all section headers have consistent left-alignment with a subtitle in text-gray-500 below.

Update Home.tsx to include the complete homepage section order: AnnouncementBar, HeroBanner, FeatureStrip, PrepaidStrategySection, FeaturedProducts, NewArrivals, WhyChooseSynklix, TrendingNow, LimitedTimeOffer, BestSellers, Testimonials, TrustBadges, PrepaidBanner, Newsletter. Ensure all sections are imported and rendered in this exact order. Remove any duplicate or out-of-order sections.

Add a 'Secure Payment Icons' row and an 'India-Wide Delivery Badge' element to the homepage footer area above the Newsletter section. The Secure Payment Icons row should display placeholder icons for UPI, Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and Net Banking in a horizontal row with label 'We Accept'. The India-Wide Delivery Badge should show a map pin icon with text 'Delivering Across All 28 States & 8 UTs in India' styled with a #4DA6FF accent. These can be grouped in a single compact full-width band with #F8F8F8 background.

On the Product Detail page, update the prepaid benefit box below the price to display: 'Pay Online & Get ₹100 OFF + Free Shipping 🎁'. Style with a soft blue (#E8F4FF) background, a #4DA6FF left border (4px), bold headline, and the four prepaid benefit lines: '✔ ₹100 Instant Discount', '✔ Free Shipping', '✔ Priority Dispatch', '✔ 10% Extra OFF on UPI/Cards'. Keep the existing PrepaidBenefitsBox component pattern.

On the Product Detail page, update the COD confirmation note to display: '⚠️ COD orders may require a confirmation call before dispatch. Prepaid orders are dispatched within 24–48 hours without any delay.' Style this as a compact warning block with a pale yellow (#FFFBEB) background, rounded-lg border, and small Poppins text. This should appear below the delivery time widget.

Update the Footer component to visually reinforce the Synklix brand: ensure the Policies column contains links to all six pages — Return Policy (/return-policy), Privacy Policy (/privacy-policy), Terms & Conditions (/terms-and-conditions), Shipping Policy (/shipping-policy), Refund Policy (/refund-policy), and About Us (/about). Add Contact Us (/contact) prominently in the Quick Links column. Maintain the existing dark (#111111) background, white text, social icons, newsletter signup, and payment icon row.

Apply mobile-first optimization across all pages: (1) Ensure all tap targets (buttons, links, nav items) are at minimum 44px height/width. (2) Ensure horizontal padding on mobile is at least px-4 on all sections. (3) Verify the sticky MobileCartBar does not overlap the floating COD Available tag, sticky Prepaid Banner, or any other fixed elements — add appropriate bottom padding/z-index stacking. (4) Ensure all text is legible at mobile viewport sizes (minimum text-sm for body copy). (5) Verify the hamburger menu drawer works correctly and all navigation links are accessible.
